AxisDataTypeEnum.description: Specify the data inherent type of the axis. The plotter uses this to choose appropriate visualization defaults (e.g an xy-point-cloud for 'discrete' or a continuous xy-curve for 'continuous'). If set to 'continuous', the data needs to be strictly monotonically increasing (no schema check, potentially a runtime check later).

Axis.description: Data describing the axis, e.g. physical unit and additional properties of the data.

customMagnitudeName.description: Custom name for the physical magnitude which will be shown by the plotter. Has preference over Magnitude3DS' internal string. No i18 yet.

logfactor.description: Logarithmic factor used for dB-scaling. Can be '20' (e.g. for a field quantity), or '10' (e.g. for a power quantity), or '0' (to explicitly disable dB-scaling). Default is '0'.

description: Root schema validating against all defined objects.
